scenarios.description: Default Lighting Plan evaluated every 30 minutes with fixed sunrise/sunset hours.
Lighting Plan with mixed Clock Time and Sun-Relative Time control points.
Lighting Plan with Peak and Valley stored as Sun-Relative Time.
Linked Lighting Plan where divergent Color Temperature timing is reasserted from Brightness timing.
Unlinked Lighting Plan where the Color Temperature Curve has independent timing.
Lighting Plan with a narrowed Color Temperature Curve value range.
TypeScript evaluation clips late-sunset timing before sampling; Python parity consumes the clipped fixture because backend clipping is future scope.
Color Mode Window with modulo-24 sun-relative wrapping and RGB outside the window.
